message:
test(engine): release gate and verification tooling enrichment across 8 modules

release_gate.rs (+428 lines):
  Gate state machine lifecycle tests, decision determinism, policy threshold
  validation, and serde roundtrips for all gate verdict types.

proof_release_gate.rs (+41 lines):
  Additional proof obligation serde roundtrips and edge case tests.

proof_obligations.rs (+298 lines):
  Proof obligation variant roundtrips, obligation resolution tracking,
  deadline enforcement, and deterministic obligation ID generation.

test262_release_gate.rs (+26 lines):
  Profile include/exclude serde roundtrips, test category filtering.

test_depth_gate.rs (+16 lines):
  Regression direction enum serde tests and depth threshold validation.

plas_release_gate.rs (+10 lines):
  Minor PLAS gate enrichment for cohort activation edge cases.

third_party_verifier.rs (+81 lines src, +7 lines tests):
  Verifier toolkit integration tests, report field documentation coverage,
  and serde roundtrips for verification result types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
